entries.message:
ValidationError: {'type': 'ArcByChord', 'x-description': 'orientation does not match keyword.', 'references': ['P1', 'P2'], 'orientation': '+', 'radius': 2.5} is not valid under any of the given schemas

Failed validating 'oneOf' in schema['allOf'][1]['properties']['topology']['allOf'][1]:
    {'oneOf': [{'properties': {'references': {'maxItems': 3, 'minItems': 3},
                               'type': {'const': 'Arc', 'type': 'string'}}},
               {'properties': {'orientation': {'enum': ['cw', 'ccw'],
                                               'type': 'string'},
                               'references': {'maxItems': 3, 'minItems': 3},
                               'type': {'const': 'ArcWithCenter',
                                        'type': 'string'}},
                'required': ['orientation']},
               {'properties': {'orientation': {'enum': ['cw', 'ccw'],
                                               'type': 'string'},
                               'radius': {'type': 'number'},
                               'references': {'maxItems': 2, 'minItems': 2},
                               'type': {'const': 'ArcByChord',
                                        'type': 'string'}},
                'required': ['radius', 'orientation']},
               {'properties': {'radius': {'type': 'number'},
                               'references': {'maxItems': 1, 'minItems': 1},
                               'type': {'const': 'CircleByCenter',
                                        'type': 'string'}},
                'required': ['radius']},
               {'not': {'required': ['startTangentVector',
                                     'endTangentVector']},
                'properties': {'references': {'minItems': 3},
                               'type': {'const': 'CubicSpline',
                                        'type': 'string'}}},
               {'properties': {'endTangentVector': {'properties': {'references': {'minItems': 2}}},
                               'references': {'minItems': 2},
                               'startTangentVector': {'properties': {'references': {'minItems': 2}}},
                               'type': {'const': 'CubicSpline',
                                        'type': 'string'}},
                'required': ['startTangentVector', 'endTangentVector']}]}

On instance['topology']:
    {'orientation': '+',
     'radius': 2.5,
     'references': ['P1', 'P2'],
     'type': 'ArcByChord',
     'x-description': 'orientation does not match keyword.'}

          PREFIX rdfs:    <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
          prefix geojson: <https://purl.org/geojson/vocab#>
          prefix topo: <https://purl.org/geojson/topo#>
          SELECT $this (topo:relatedFeatures as ?path) (?ref as ?value)
          WHERE {
           $this topo:relatedFeatures/rdf:rest*/rdf:first ?ref .
           $this a ?geomtype .
           FILTER ( ?geomtype != geojson:Polygon)
           FILTER NOT EXISTS { ?ref ?p ?o }
          }
  ") ]
  	Message: Referenced features must be present within current graph closure for  topological feature.
